guarded so that individual test files which `vi.mock()` a\n * module (replacing its exports with stubs) will not cause the entire\n * cleanup to blow up — the missing reset function is simply skipped.\n */\nexport async function cleanupAllState(): Promise<void> {\n  // Helper: call `fn` only if it exists on the imported module.\n  const tryReset = async (spec: string, ...fns: string[]): Promise<void> => {\n    try {\n      const mod = await import(spec);\n      for (const fn of fns) {\n        if (typeof mod[fn] === \"function\") {\n          await mod[fn]();\n        }\n      }\n    } catch {\n      // Module may be mocked or not reachable — skip silently.\n    }\n  };\n\n  // ---- cache.ts ----------------------------------------------------------\n  await tryReset(\"../cache.js\", \"resetAllCacheStateForTesting\");\n\n  // ---- alerts-poller.ts ---------------------------------------------------\n  await tryReset(\"../alerts-poller.js\", \"resetAlertsCacheForTesting\");\n\n  // ---- authentication.ts -------------------------------------------------\n  await tryReset(\"../middleware/authentication.js\", Helper to get a CSRF token from the test app.\n * Makes a GET request to /api/csrf-token and extracts the token.\n */\nexport async function getCsrfToken(app: {\n  request(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<Response>;\n}): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await app.request(\"/api/csrf-token\");\n  if (res.status !== 200) {\n    throw new Error(`Failed to get CSRF token: ${res.status}`);\n  }\n  const body = (await res.json()) as { token: string };\n  return body.token;\n}\n\n/**\n * Helper to make a state-changing request with CSRF token.\n * Gets a fresh token and ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nfunction createMockAlerts(overrides: Partial<ParsedAlert>[] = []): ParsedAlert[] {\n  const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);\n  return [\n    {\n      id: \"alert-1\",\n      effect: \"DELAY\",\n      affectedLines: [\"1\"],\n      affectedStops: [\"101\", \"102\"],\n      activePeriod: {\n        start: now - ...overrides,\n  ];\n}\n\nfunction createMorningScores(base: number = 0.5): MorningScoreMap {\n  return {\n    \"fav-1\": { line: \"1\", scores: [base + 0.3, base + 0.2, base + 0.1] },\n    \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [base + 0.1, base + 0.15, base + 0.05] },\n    \"fav-3\": { line: \"C\", scores: [base + 0.05, base + 0.08, base + 0.03] },\n  };\n}\n\n//   for (const file of tempFilesToCleanup) {\n        try {\n          if (existsSync(file)) {\n            unlinkSync(file);\n          }\n        } catch {\n          // Ignore cleanup errors\n        }\n      }\n    };\n\n    // Clean up on process exit (crash-safe)\n    process.on(\"exit\", cleanup);\n    process.on(\"SIGINT\", () => {\n      cleanup();\n      process.exit(0);\n    });\n    process.on(\"SIGTERM\", () => {\n      cleanup();\n      process.exit(0);\n    });\n  });\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDbPath = join(tmpdir(), `test-push-briefing-${crypto.randomUUID()}.db`);\n unlinkSync(file);\n        }\n      } catch {\n        // Ignore cleanup errors\n      }\n      tempFilesToCleanup.splice(i, 1);\n    }\n  });\n\n  afterAll(() => {\n    // Final cleanup in case any   }\n    }\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Briefing Payload Generation\", () => {\n    it(\"generates payload for favorites with lines\", () => {\n      const favorites: PushFavoriteTuple[] = [\n        { id: MorningScoreMap = {\n        \"fav-1\": { line: \"1\", scores: [0.8, 0.7, 0.6] },\n        \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [0.5, 0.4, 0.3] },\n      };\n\n      // Import and test the buildBriefingPayload function\n      // Since it's not exported, we'll test through the scheduler\n      const payload = {\n        alertId: \"morning-briefing\",\n        title: \"Good morning! Subway status\",\n        body: \"(1) (A) — All clear! No active alerts.\",\n        lines: [\"1\", \"A\"],\n        severity: \"info\" as const,\n        changeType: \"new\" as const,\n        timestamp: Date.now(),\n      };\n\n crash-safe cleanup handler\n    const cleanup = () => {\n      for (const file of tempFilesToCleanup) {\n        try {\n          if (existsSync(file)) {\n            unlinkSync(file);\n          }\n        } catch {\n          // Ignore cleanup errors\n        }\n      }\n    };\n\n    // Clean up on process exit (crash-safe)\n    process.on(\"exit\", cleanup);\n    process.on(\"SIGINT\", () => {\n      cleanup();\n      process.exit(0);\n    });\n    process.on(\"SIGTERM\", () => {\n      cleanup();\n      process.exit(0);\n    });\n  });\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    // Use a temp file getSubscriptionCount();\n      expect(afterCount).toBe(beforeCount - 1);\n    });\n\n    it(\"returns false for non-existent endpoint\", () => {\n      const removed =
